name: Merge Marbles
short_description: Merge Marbles is a relaxing puzzle game where your goal is to merge as many pairs of the same coloured marbles as you can. Each time you merge a pair it creates the next tier all the way up to the big pink marble. Try your best to merge the pink marble to clear as much space as you can!
detailed_description:
Merge Marbles is a relaxing physics based puzzle game where your goal is to merge as many pairs of the same coloured marbles as you can. Each time you merge a pair it creates the next tier all the way up to the big pink marble. Try your best to merge the pink marble to clear as much space as you can!

- Hours of addicting gameplay

- Unlockable skins for your marbles using in-game currency earned from getting high-scores

- Trophies that you can earn to keep track of all of your achievements and progress

- Many accessibility options to help with visual aid and colour deficiency

This game is an early alpha game and your saves may be subject to loss. Players will be informed when this may occur
